_comment: Template for the `polkadotTestnet` genesis config. Copy this file to genesis-testnet.json (gitignored) and fill it in before running `npm run deploy:univerify:testnet`. Replace each `account` with the real Ethereum address of the university. `metadataHash` should be the keccak256 of the institution's off-chain metadata document (DID doc, IPFS CID, etc.), or 0x00..00 if none. `approvalThreshold` must satisfy 1 <= threshold <= issuers.length.
